URGENT - WINTER WEATHER MESSAGE
National Weather Service Detroit/Pontiac MI
947 AM EDT Sun Mar 15 2026

MIZ047>049-053>055-151500-

Midland-Bay-Huron-Saginaw-Tuscola-Sanilac-
Including the cities of Sandusky, Bay City, Midland, Saginaw, Bad
Axe, and Caro
947 AM EDT Sun Mar 15 2026

...WINTER WEATHER ADVISORY IS CANCELLED...

Snow and wintry mixed precipitation has ended across the Tri Cities 
and northern Thumb. Expect gusty east wind to continue while 
temperatures rise steadily above freezing during the morning.
